title: toard invitation
descriptionValid: You have been invited as {email}. Set a password to sign up.
descriptionInvalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one from your administrator.

errors.invalidInvite: This invitation is invalid or has expired.
errors.acceptFailed: Failed to accept the invitation (it expired or the email is already registered).
errors.autoLoginFailed: Sign-up succeeded, but automatic sign-in failed. Please sign in from the sign-in page.
